name: FunctionalInfusion Website
description: Initial wireframe — all pages, security, SEO, and config scaffolded. Pending: brand colors from marketing guidelines, real copy, actual address/phone, Indeed employer slug, backend API endpoints, and server-side validation.
securityFeatures: No eval(), no innerHTML with user input
Token budget enforcement for AI API calls
seoFeatures: Schema.org JSON-LD structured data (Organization, WebSite, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage, ContactPage, MedicalWebPage)
todoBeforeLaunch: Apply brand colors and fonts from SharePoint marketing guidelines
Replace all [WIREFRAME: ...] placeholder content with real copy
Obtain and insert Indeed employer company slug
Build and connect backend API for contact form (/api/contact)
Implement server-side input validation and sanitization
Implement server-side rate limiting and CSRF verification
Add real team photos and clinic imagery
Set up Google Analytics / privacy-respecting analytics
Submit sitemap.xml to Google Search Console and Bing
Configure SSL/TLS certificate on hosting server
Test on all target browsers and devices
Run Lighthouse audit and address any gaps
